title: SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used low cost goods for families in the area that have been donated. Proceeds go toward Habitat for Humanity's affordable homeownership program. Donations and volunteers welcome. 211 E Cascade Avenue Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations accepted: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm Email (541) 549-1740 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 549-1740 Main phone Main phone (541) 549-1740 Thrift Store Intake (541) 549-1193 Volunteers Kristina [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Store: Walk in -Check website for information including acceptable donation items -Volunteering: Call or email FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Sisters, Sisters School District TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of E Cascade Avenue and South Fir Street Services: Book/Magazine Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Holiday Donations Kitchenware Donation Programs Thrift Shops Toy/Game Donation Programs Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
